pre_result_data_replication_amendment.trigger: The first attempted run stopped before any return simulation because ETC-USDT-SWAP lacked the dynamic dataset's consecutive point-in-time spot-eligibility history at 2024-06-05 04:00 UTC.
pre_result_data_replication_amendment.change: The fixed survivor baseline is rebuilt from the parent H22 closed local 15-minute source, while the dynamic panel remains on the validated point-in-time dataset. Overlapping fixed-symbol 4h prices must pass a separate source-consistency audit.
pre_result_data_replication_amendment.unchanged: All signal, universe, cost, concentration and decision gates remain unchanged. No PnL or return result existed before this amendment.

purpose: Test whether the frozen H22 14-day momentum evidence survives replacement of the current fixed survivor list with a causal point-in-time OKX universe. The dynamic universe is not an optimizer and cannot change H22 parameters.

frozen_parent_signal.weighting: equal within each side and equal across three cohorts

point_in_time_universe.minimum_listing_history: Require 85 consecutive closed 4h bars ending at the signal bar, which is the minimum needed for an exact 84-bar return without gaps.
point_in_time_universe.liquidity_measure: Sum of vol_quote over the latest 84 closed 4h bars ending at the signal bar.
point_in_time_universe.liquidity_selection: Select the top 18 eligible instruments by trailing 84-bar quote volume, using stable mergesort and instrument name as deterministic tie order.
point_in_time_universe.matched_size_reason: The frozen H22 parent panel contains 18 instruments; matching the count isolates survivor-list composition rather than breadth.
point_in_time_universe.spot_presence: Already enforced at each 4h bar by the validated dataset.

dynamic_membership_handling.scheduled_refresh: At each cohort's frozen 3-day refresh, apply the unchanged 4-in/6-out momentum hysteresis within the current top-18 liquid point-in-time universe.
dynamic_membership_handling.unscheduled_forced_exit: If an incumbent is no longer point-in-time eligible or lacks the next entry open, remove it causally at that decision time even when the cohort is not scheduled to refresh.
dynamic_membership_handling.vacancy_between_refreshes: Remain in cash until that cohort's next scheduled refresh; do not fill a forced-exit vacancy early.
dynamic_membership_handling.delisting_during_holding_interval: Use the last available complete 4h close before the next decision as the terminal exit price, charge one-way exit cost, and hold cash thereafter.

comparison_panels.fixed_panel_source: Parent H22 closed local 15-minute candles strictly resampled to complete 4-hour bars.
comparison_panels.fixed_panel_purpose: Rebuild the parent fixed survivor selection from its original source under the same reserve cost model. A separate overlapping-price consistency audit guards against source differences.
comparison_panels.dynamic_panel_purpose: Replace only the current survivor list with the frozen point-in-time policy.

costs.funding_reserve_reason: Observed funding history is currently complete only for the fixed 18-symbol panel. The same conservative reserve is therefore applied to both panels to isolate universe composition without adding another download or asymmetric data quality.

prohibited_actions: change the top-18 liquidity count after viewing returns
change the 84-bar formation or volume window
change entry rank 4 or exit rank 6
change cohort cadence, offsets, anchor or gross exposure
select a best subset of dynamic symbols, dates, months or regimes
replace the reserve model asymmetrically between fixed and dynamic panels
use future listing, delisting, volume or price information
promote the result to A-grade signals or order execution
